vCVmCd4jQ3Q5.code:
// Wynnies
// 01-04-26
// Based on Luxury of the Cease-Fire by Salted, found here:
//   https://musescore.com/user/35228398/scores/11780221


// Issues I ran into
// 01-04-26
// Transposition didn't work on the trumpet arrange: it affected the gain rather than the note values.
// Fix was to move the transposition before the gain function.


// Samples
samples('github:Wynnies/Strudel-Samples')


// Flute in A major (C#, F#, G#)
let vflute1 = `<
[- - [- b4] [c#5 d5]]
>`.gain(range(1, 1.25))

let vflute2 = arrange([2, `<
[e5 - [- f#5] [e5 d5]]
[b4 - [- b4] [c#5 d5]]
>`],[1, `<
[c#5 b4 a#4 c#5]
>`.decay(.75)], [1, `<<
[b4 - [- b4] [c#5 d5]]
[b4@2 - -]
>>`],).gain(1.25)


// Soprano Saxophone in Bb in B major (trans -2, A#, C#, D#, F#, G#)
let vsax = `<
[[b3 d#4] f#4 - -]
[[f#4 a#4] c#5 - -]
[[g#4 b#4] d#5 - -]
[[c#5 e5] g#5 - -]
>`.trans("-2M")


// Horn in C in A major (trans 0, C#, F# G#)
let vhorn = arrange([1, `<
[c#3 b2 a#2 c#3]
>`.attack(.4).decay(.1)],[1, `<
[b2 - - -]
>`.decay(1)],)


// Trumpet in Bb in B major (trans -2, A#, C#, D#, F#, G#)
let vtrumpet = arrange([1, `<
[- - [- c#5] [d#5 e5]]
>`.trans("-2M")],[2, `<
[f#5 - [- g#5] [f#5 e5]]
[c#5 - [- c#5] [d#5 e5]]
>`.trans("-2M").gain(1.25)],[1, `<
[d#5 c#5 b#4 d#5]
>`.trans("-2M").decay(.5).gain(1.25)],[1, `<
[c#5@2 - -]
>`.trans("-2M").gain(1.25)],)


// Trombone in A major (C#, F#, G#)
let vtrombone = `<->`


// Bass Drum
let vbd = arrange([1, `<
[- - bd@2]
>`.gain(1.75)],[8, `<
[bd -@0.5 [bd@0.25]*3 -@0.75 -]
>`.gain(.75)])


// Snare Drum
let vsd = `<->`


// Piano in A major (C#, F#, G#)
let vpiano1 = `<
[[a2 c#3] e3 - -]
[[e3 g#3] b3 - -]
[[f#3 a#3] c#4 - -]
[[b3 d4] f#4 - -]
>`.gain(.75) // Niet in gebruik

let vpiano2 = stack(`<
[[a3 c#4]*4]
[[g#3 b3]*4]
[[f#3 a#3]*4]
[[b3 d4]*4]
>`,`<
[a2@2 c#3@2]
[g#2@2 b2@2]
[f#2@2 c#3@2]
<[b2@2 f#3@2]
[b2@2]*2
>>`).gain(.75)


// Tracks
setcpm(75/2)
$: stack(arrange( // Flute
  [3, silence],
  [1, vflute1],
  [8, vflute2],
  [0, silence],
).note().sound("gm_flute").release(.25).color("cyan")._pianoroll(), arrange( // Soprano Saxophone
  [0, silence],
  [4, vsax],
  [8, silence],
).note().sound("gm_soprano_sax").release(.25).color("lime")._pianoroll(), arrange( // Horn
  [6, silence],
  [2, vhorn],
  [4, silence],
).note().sound("gm_horn").color("red")._pianoroll(), arrange( // Trumpet
  [7, silence],
  [5, vtrumpet],
  [0, silence],
).note().sound("gm_trumpet").color("yellow")._pianoroll(), arrange( // Bass Drum
  [3, silence],
  [9, vbd],
  [0, silence],
).sound().bank("RolandTR808").color("orange")._pianoroll(), arrange( // Snare Drum
  [12, silence],
  [0, vsd],
  [0, silence],
).sound().bank("RolandTR808").color("blue")._pianoroll(), arrange( // Piano
  [0, silence],
  [4, vpiano1],
  [8, vpiano2],
  [0, silence],
).note().sound("gm_piano").color("magenta")._pianoroll(),).room(.8).size(1)

all(pianoroll({labels:1}))



// Testing
_$: arrange( // Horn
  [2, vhorn],
).note().sound("horn").color("red")._pianoroll()
